failure_investigation.root_cause: Roll control authority lost during atmospheric reentry due to blocked thruster valves, leading to unstable attitude and structural breakup under aerodynamic forces.

planner_agent.assessment: Ascent phase executed flawlessly. Coast phase objectives met. Reentry attitude diverged from planned trajectory at T+2700s.

resource_agent.assessment: Propellant transfer demo completed successfully. Thruster propellant lines experienced unexpected thermal conditions.

risk_agent.assessment: Loss of roll control detected at upper atmosphere boundary. Aerodynamic forces exceeded structural limits during uncontrolled spin.

ai_analysis.what_pixie_would_have_done: PIXIE would have detected early signs of valve blockage via thermal signatures at T+2500s and commanded an immediate switch to redundant cold-gas thrusters to stabilize the roll rate before entering the thicker atmosphere.
